name: Comms Forensics
description: Deep extract of personal communications: iMessage handles + threads + URLs + bodies, Mail.app envelopes + bodies, FaceTime call history. Encrypted by default — message bodies and call records carry personal content. Use this for investigating a specific incident, not for routine posture monitoring.

plugins.role: Full iMessage message bodies (encrypted at rest)
Mail.app envelope metadata: sender, subject, headers, received-at
Full Mail.app message bodies (encrypted at rest)
FaceTime call history: peers, durations, connection state
